name: NURSENAV INC
description: NurseNav is a North Charleston, SC-based HIPAA-compliant patient navigation SaaS platform for oncology and chronic disease programs. Founded 2007. CONNECT platform tracks patients through continuum of care with dashboards, workflow tools, EHR integration, and mobile app (My Nursenav). Specializes in cancer care patient navigation. Real product company with SaaS model.

name: BRAVE INC
description: Brave is a major privacy-focused web browser company founded in 2015 by Brendan Eich (creator of JavaScript, Mozilla co-founder) and Brian Bondy. Browser launched January 2016. Chromium-based with built-in ad blocking, fingerprinting protection, and Tor private windows. 100M+ global users. Revenue from Brave Rewards (Basic Attention Token / BAT cryptocurrency). Users earn BAT by opting into privacy-respecting ads. Brave Ads network. Full tech company with global reach.
recent_news: Surpassed 100M monthly active users. Continued growth in privacy browser market.

contacts.name: Ms Lisa Amerine
contacts.title: Agent (registered agent)
contacts.note: This is a registered agent, not an employee. Key contacts at Brave: Brendan Eich (CEO) brendan@brave.com and Brian Bondy (CTO).

name: WELLTRACKONE CORPORATION
description: WellTrackONE is a Hilton Head, SC-based health technology company providing Medicare Annual Wellness Visit solutions for healthcare providers. SaaS platform including tablet-based patient self-assessment, clinical risk analysis/coding tools, and PharmD Concierge service. Focuses on helping medical practices improve patient outcomes and revenue through Medicare compliance. Bootstrap Venture Partners portfolio company.

name: CHARGERBACK INC
description: Chargerback is a Carson City, NV-based SaaS platform providing end-to-end lost and found management for hotels, resorts, airlines, amusement parks, and more. Founded 2008. Provides web-based inventory system, IFRAME guest-reporting forms for hotel websites, automated item-return workflows, and Lost & Found Pros integration for unclaimed item salvage. Free basic tier for hospitality enterprises. Achieves 90%+ return rates while cutting staff effort in half. Won 2019 Hotel 360 Tech Revolution of the Year Award. Phone: (800) 515-4860.
recent_news: Won 2019 Hotel 360 Tech Revolution of the Year Award. Partnership with Lost & Found Pros for unclaimed item disposition.

name: CIMX LLC
description: CIMx Software is a Cincinnati, OH-based manufacturing execution system (MES) provider. Quantum MES platform delivers smart, scalable production control for small to mid-size manufacturers. Specializes in Aerospace & Defense, Medical Device, Carbon Composites, Electronic Assembly, Consumer Products, and Industrial Production. Features: real-time WIP tracking, production scheduling, inventory management, quality control, and analytics. One of the few woman-owned small businesses in manufacturing tech. 25 years' experience.

name: QUESTIS
description: Questis is a Charleston, SC-based workforce financial empowerment SaaS platform. Founded by Steve Wilbourne and John Tabb. Combines software with credentialed financial advisors to help employees manage personal finances — budgeting to investing. Raised $11.2M total (seed 2015, multiple rounds through 2017+). Rebranded in 2021 to emphasize 'workforce financial empowerment.' Serves employers who offer financial wellness benefits to staff.
recent_news: 2021 rebrand to workforce financial empowerment positioning.

name: HOOK SECURITY INC
description: Hook Security is a Lakeland, FL-based (registered in SC) cybersecurity awareness training SaaS company. Founded 2019 by Zachary 'Zach' Eikenberry. Delivers 'Psychological Security' (PsySec) training — differentiating from outdated compliance-click-through training by using latest behavioral and psychological research. Distributed via channel partners: MSPs, MSSPs, VARs, Agents, and Distributors. Integrates with Slack via Haekka partnership. CEO has 5+ years leading the company.
recent_news: Partnership with Haekka to deliver training within Slack. Growing channel partner distribution.

name: RANT SOLUTIONS LLC
filter_reason: RANT Solutions is a veteran-owned IT product sourcing, security solutions, and government contracting company. Model is services + product sourcing for government clients, not a scalable software product company. Revenue from RFP/government contracts and product reselling.
description: Disabled-veteran owned company providing IT product sourcing, RFID/access control solutions, software development services, and government contract support in Mount Pleasant, SC. CEO Robert Constantinou has broadcast/media background.

name: IMAGEQUIX
description: ImageQuix (now rebranded as Captura, captura.io) is an industry-leading e-commerce and workflow management SaaS platform for professional photographers. Founded 1997, headquartered in Raleigh NC (SC entity 2018). Specializes in high-volume and education photography. Active acquisition strategy: acquired Fotomerchant (Dec 2023) and Skylab AI image editing (2024). New CEO Brett Zucker appointed Oct 2024. ASG (Alpine Software Group) portfolio company.
recent_news: Rebranded as Captura (captura.io). Acquired Fotomerchant (Dec 2023) and Skylab AI (2024). New CEO Brett Zucker (Oct 2024).
